input_roman: PHD applicants ke liye minimum requirements kya hain?
response_roman: PhD applicants ke liye minimum requirements hain: HEC se manzoor shuda university se relevant subject mein MS, MPhil ya barabar degree honi chahiye jisme kam az kam 60% marks ya 4.00 scale par 3.00 CGPA ho, aur taleem ka duration 18 saal ho. Iske ilawa, GRE/GAT ya fast nuces admission test mein kam az kam 60% score hona chahiye.

input_roman: 2026 ke admission process mein application submission ki dates kya hain.
response_roman: 2026 ke admission process mein application submission ki dates May 19 se July 4 tak hain.

input_roman: Applicants ko kaun se documents submit karne zaroori hain?
response_roman: Applicants ko admission confirmation, transcripts, comprehensive exam results, plagiarism report, journal publication aur correspondence, aur foreign reviewer consents jama karne zaroori hain.

input_roman: Admission ke baad candidates ko kaunsi additional support provide ki ja sakti hai?
response_roman: Admission ke baad candidates ko mukhtalif financial assistance, scholarships, loans, aur university assistantships ki support faraham ki ja sakti hai.

input_roman: Provisional admission kis ko di ja sakti hain?
response_roman: Provisional admission un candidates ko di ja sakti hain jo results ka intezar kar rahe hain aur maqsoos marks hasil karne par munhasir hai.

input_roman: Kya university apne students ke liye health insurance ya medical coverage plans offer karti hain?
response_roman: Mujhe is bare mein kafi maloomat nahi hai.

input_roman: University ki library digital resources aur e-books ka kitna collection hai?
response_roman: Mujhe is bare mein kafi maloomat nahi hai.

input_roman: fast nuces mein student counseling ya mental health support service available hai.
response_roman: Mujhe is bare mein kaafi maloomat nahi hai.
